title: 三歩進み、二歩下がって、一歩

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
While walking around the central plaza, I spot
Mejiro Dober.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
...All right. My shoes are on tight and my legs are
all warmed up.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Now I just need to wait for Air Groove.

text_block_list.name: Peppy Voice
text_block_list.text:
Oh, Air Groove! You were wonderful in the photo
shoot! Would you like to join us for some tea?!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Oh, thank you for your kind offer, but I'm afraid I
have a practice run coming up.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume Student A
text_block_list.text:
You're going to run?! Um, would you mind if we
watched? Just for our own reference!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Sorry. I only practice in environments where I can
focus completely.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
I'll let you know if there's an opportunity for you
to come and watch. But this time...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Air Groove. It's okay... I'm fine with them
watching.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Dober! But you...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: It's fine. I want to check something.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: So, please, let them watch us.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
...All right. Could you head to the track ahead of
us? I'll be right there.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: O-okay!

text_block_list.name: Younger Students
text_block_list.text:
I can't believe we get to see a race between the
school's best! Let's go grab good seats!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: ...I'm not going to go easy on you, Dober.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Good. I'm not planning on holding anything back
either.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Oh? Big talk. I'm excited to see whether you can
back it up.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume Student A
text_block_list.text:
And they're off! Holy smokes! They're already
running that fast?!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume Student B
text_block_list.text:
Such incredible speed... Neither one's giving up
their lead!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: (I won't... lose! In fact, I'm barely getting started!)

text_block_list.name: Younger Students
text_block_list.text:
Go, Air Groove, go!
You've got this, Doberrrr!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Hah... No matter how huge the obstacle! I will... overcome it!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Huff... Huff... Huff... I lost by... seven lengths.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
...Dang it. There are still... some hurdles... I can't
clear.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
No, that big talk was more than just hot air. You
had me in a panic for a moment back there.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
...So, were you able to check what you wanted
to?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: ...Yes.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
I'm still no match for you. I go too hard and end
up exhausting myself.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: But I'm glad.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: This frustration is proof that I'm making progress.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Heh. Dober, you really have changed.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Hehehe... Seems that way!
